title: Aeronautics:Wind Tunnel
description: Wind Tunnel is a NeoForge add-on for Minecraft 1.21.1 built around Create, Sable, Simulated, and Create: Aeronautics. The project focuses on controllable airflow sources and repeatable aircraft test setups for tuning, debugging, and gameplay experiments.
body:
# About

Wind Tunnel is a NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 built around Create, Sable, Simulated, and Create: Aeronautics. The project focuses on controllable airflow sources and repeatable aircraft test setups for tuning, debugging, and gameplay experiments.

## Current feature set

- Configurable wind tunnel blocks that project a controllable wind field into the world
- A dedicated wind tunnel controller for flow length, airspeed, and blade spin settings
- An aircraft airflow injector for body-relative or world-relative test flow injection
- A wind tunnel mount and interface pair for aircraft binding, pose locking, and force readback
- In-game measurement views for lift, drag, side force, and rotational moments

## Included content

- `Wind Tunnel`
- `Wind Tunnel Controller`
- `Aircraft Airflow Injector`
- `Wind Tunnel Mount`
- `Wind Tunnel Mount Interface`
